matches.x: A hes burden of. Egypt... Behold, the. Lord..rideth upon. a -awift cloud, and: shall. come: into.Egypt; and. the idols of. Egypt: shall be moved at his presence, and the heart of Egypt shall melt in the midst of ite. 5:

head and tail --proverbial for the highest and lowest (De 28:13, 44). branch and rush--another image for the same thought (Isa 19:15). The branch is elevated on the top of the tree: the rush is coarse and low

5 (return) [ It seems to me contrary to the opinion of Josephus, and of
the moderns, both Jews and Christians, that this prophecy of Isaiah,
19:19, etc., "In that day there shall be an altar to the Lord in the
midst of the land of Egypt," etc., directly foretold the building of
this temple of Onias in Egypt, and was a sufficient warrant to the Jews
for building it, and for worshipping the true…

Israel is between them - Israel is the bridge between Egypt and Assyria. The only way out of the world is through Israel.
